initial_program:
% Dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R) :- n_rows(N), R >= 0, R < N.
col(C) :- n_cols(M), C >= 0, C < M.
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Region predicate
region(R,C) :- R >= 3, R <= 9, C >= 1, C <= 10.
region(R,C) :- R = 1, C = 3.
region(R,C) :- R = 1, C = 4.
region(R,C) :- R = 2, C = 3.
region(R,C) :- R = 2, C = 4.
region(R,C) :- R = 10, C = 3.
region(R,C) :- R = 11, C = 3.

% Allowed output colours
allowed(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
allowed(R,C,3)  :- input(R,C,0), region(R,C).
allowed(R,C,0)  :- input(R,C,0), not region(R,C).

% Exactly one output per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : allowed(R,C,Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

#show output/3.

% Dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.
% Row domain with safe grounding.
row_domain(R,N) :- n_rows(N), R >= 0, R < N.
row(R) :- row_domain(R,N).
% Column domain with safe grounding.
col_domain(C,M) :- n_cols(M), C >= 0, C < M.
col(C) :- col_domain(C,M).
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Region predicate
region(R,C) :- R >= 3, R <= 9, C >= 1, C <= 10.
region(R,C) :- R = 1, C = 3.
region(R,C) :- R = 1, C = 4.
region(R,C) :- R = 2, C = 3.
region(R,C) :- R = 2, C = 4.
region(R,C) :- R = 10, C = 3.
region(R,C) :- R = 11, C = 3.

% Allowed output colours
allowed(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
allowed(R,C,3)  :- input(R,C,0), region(R,C).
allowed(R,C,0)  :- input(R,C,0), not region(R,C).

% Exactly one output per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : allowed(R,C,Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

% Dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.
% Row and column domains with safe grounding.
row(R) :- n_rows(N), R >= 0, R < N.
col(C) :- n_cols(M), C >= 0, C < M.
% Simple positive grounding to make R and C safe
row(R) :- true.
col(C) :- true.
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Region predicate
region(R,C) :- R >= 3, R <= 9, C >= 1, C <= 10.
region(R,C) :- R = 1, C = 3.
region(R,C) :- R = 1, C = 4.
region(R,C) :- R = 2, C = 3.
region(R,C) :- R = 2, C = 4.
region(R,C) :- R = 10, C = 3.
region(R,C) :- R = 11, C = 3.

% Allowed output colours
allowed(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.
allowed(R,C,3)  :- input(R,C,0), region(R,C).
allowed(R,C,0)  :- input(R,C,0), not region(R,C).

% Exactly one output per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : allowed(R,C,Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).
